name: Kikukawa Enterprise, Inc.
summary: Kikukawa Enterprise, Inc. manufactures and sells sawmilling and woodworking machinery in Japan. It provides glue laminated board and CLT, lumber core and other wood, plywood and board, and plastic and printed circuit board machines; wide belt sanders; and machine tools for FMC polyfoam models, railway vehicles, aircrafts, and various metal products. The company was formerly known as Kikukawa Iron Works, Inc. and changed its name to Kikukawa Enterprise, Inc. in October 2012. Kikukawa Enterprise, Inc. was founded in 1897 and is headquartered in Ise, Japan.
